_doc: Topology + allowlist config consumed by preflight.mjs. Rename this file to preflight-config.json (drop the .example.) to activate it. Edit to change what the preflight gate considers a known repo / allowed top-level / per-product-repo extension. Keep in sync with fleet-internal-repos.txt / fleet-oss-repos.txt manifest files.

productRepoAllowedTopLevel._doc: Per-repo allowlist extensions. Map of <repo-name> → list of additional top-level paths permitted only in that repo (e.g. a Unity project's build dir).
